name: Tengra SSH
description: System SSH based connect, execute, and disconnect tools packaged as an external MCP plugin.
author: Tengra Studio

tools.name: connect
tools.description: Store a non-secret SSH host descriptor in plugin-local storage.

tools.name: execute
tools.description: Run a bounded command through the system ssh client.

tools.name: disconnect
tools.description: Remove a stored SSH host descriptor.
